title: Infosys receives CGST penalty order for INR 8,27,50,000
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Joint Commissioner of CGST for collection of a penalty totaling INR 8,27,50,000. The matter relates to alleged GST input tax credit issues for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: The Joint Commissioner of CGST passed orders/action for collection of a total penalty of INR 8,27,50,000/-.
The alleged violations relate to disallowance of Blocked ITC, Excess ITC, Wrong head, and invoices not in 2A for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23.
Infosys stated there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/action taken for alleged disallowance of Blocked ITC, Excess ITC, Wrong head, and invoices not in 2A for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the amount of the CGST penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports Infosys's stated assessment of impact.
